  • 大括号像两只手把同一组设置拢住，意思是“这些东西算一伙”。
  • 这里在给“name”挂牌子，告诉系统它该指向“@openclaw/nextcloud-talk”。
  • 这里在给“openclaw”挂牌子，告诉系统它该指向“{”。
原文代码块
{
  "name": "@openclaw/nextcloud-talk",
  "openclaw": {
    "extensions": ["./index.ts"],
    "channel": {
      "id": "nextcloud-talk",
      "label": "Nextcloud Talk",
      "selectionLabel": "Nextcloud Talk (self-hosted)",
      "docsPath": "/channels/nextcloud-talk",
      "docsLabel": "nextcloud-talk",
      "blurb": "Self-hosted chat via Nextcloud Talk webhook bots.",
      "order": 65,
      "aliases": ["nc-talk", "nc"]
    },
    "install": {
      "npmSpec": "@openclaw/nextcloud-talk",
      "localPath": "<bundled-plugin-local-path>",
      "defaultChoice": "npm"
    }
  }
}
像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Useful openclaw.消息通道 fields beyond the minimal example:。

原文小纸条

Useful openclaw.channel fields beyond the minimal example:

像准备清单

这一串条目别硬背，把它当成“Channel catalog metadata”门口贴出来的几张便签就行。它们在提醒你先备好什么、别漏掉什么、哪里最容易走错：detailLabel: secondary label for richer c…、docsLabel: override link text for the doc…、preferOver: lower-priority 新本领插件/消息通道 ids…、selectionDocsPrefix, selectionDocsOmitLab…。

原文小纸条
  • detailLabel: secondary label for richer catalog/status surfaces
  • docsLabel: override link text for the docs link
  • preferOver: lower-priority plugin/channel ids this catalog entry should outrank
  • selectionDocsPrefix, selectionDocsOmitLabel, selectionExtras: selection-surface copy controls
  • markdownCapable: marks the channel as markdown-capable for outbound formatting decisions
  • exposure.configured: hide the channel from configured-channel listing surfaces when set to false
  • exposure.setup: hide the channel from interactive setup/configure pickers when set to false
  • exposure.docs: mark the channel as internal/private for docs navigation surfaces
  • showConfigured / showInSetup: legacy aliases still accepted for compatibility; prefer exposure
  • quickstartAllowFrom: opt the channel into the standard quickstart allowFrom flow
  • forceAccountBinding: require explicit account binding even when only one account exists
  • preferSessionLookupForAnnounceTarget: prefer session lookup when resolving announce targets
像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：OpenClaw can also merge **external 消息通道 catalogs** (for example, an MPM registry export). Drop a JSON file at one of:。

原文小纸条

OpenClaw can also merge **external channel catalogs** (for example, an MPM registry export). Drop a JSON file at one of:

像准备清单

这一串条目别硬背，把它当成“Channel catalog metadata”门口贴出来的几张便签就行。它们在提醒你先备好什么、别漏掉什么、哪里最容易走错：~/.openclaw/mpm/新本领插件s.json、~/.openclaw/mpm/catalog.json、~/.openclaw/新本领插件s/catalog.json。

原文小纸条
  • ~/.openclaw/mpm/plugins.json
  • ~/.openclaw/mpm/catalog.json
  • ~/.openclaw/plugins/catalog.json
像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Or point OPENCLAW_新本领插件_CATALOG_PATHS (or OPENCLAW_MPM_CATALOG_PATHS) at one or more JSON files (comma/semicolon/PATH-d…。

原文小纸条

Or point OPENCLAW_PLUGIN_CATALOG_PATHS (or OPENCLAW_MPM_CATALOG_PATHS) at one or more JSON files (comma/semicolon/PATH-delimited). Each file should contain { "entries": [ { "name": "@scope/pkg", "openclaw": { "channel": {...}, "install": {...} } } ] }. The parser also accepts "packages" or "plugins" as legacy aliases for the "entries" key.

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Generated 消息通道 catalog entries and provider install catalog entries expose normalized install-source facts next to the…。

原文小纸条

Generated channel catalog entries and provider install catalog entries expose normalized install-source facts next to the raw openclaw.install block. The normalized facts identify whether the npm spec is an exact version or floating selector, whether expected integrity metadata is present, and whether a local source path is also available. When the catalog/package identity is known, the normalized facts warn if the parsed npm package name drifts from that identity. They also warn when defaultChoice is invalid or points at a source that is not available, and when npm integrity metadata is present without a valid npm source. Consumers should treat installSource as an additive optional field so hand-built entries and catalog shims do not have to synthesize it. This lets onboarding and diagnostics explain source-plane state without importing plugin runtime.

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Official external npm entries should prefer an exact npmSpec plus expectedIntegrity. Bare package names and dist-tags s…。

原文小纸条

Official external npm entries should prefer an exact npmSpec plus expectedIntegrity. Bare package names and dist-tags still work for compatibility, but they surface source-plane warnings so the catalog can move toward pinned, integrity-checked installs without breaking existing plugins. When onboarding installs from a local catalog path, it records a managed plugin plugin index entry with source: "path" and a workspace-relative sourcePath when possible. The absolute operational load path stays in plugins.load.paths; the install record avoids duplicating local workstation paths into long-lived config. This keeps local development installs visible to source-plane diagnostics without adding a second raw filesystem-path disclosure surface. The persisted plugins/installs.json plugin index is the install source of truth and can be refreshed without loading plugin runtime modules. Its installRecords map is durable even when a plugin manifest is missing or invalid; its plugins array is a rebuildable manifest view.

第 22 站

Context engine 新本领插件s

这一节在讲规则和边界：什么默认允许、什么必须显式打开、什么被禁止。

这段在解决什么

这一节在讲规则和边界：什么默认允许、什么必须显式打开、什么被禁止。

为什么值得看

这种内容决定了 OpenClaw 是“能做”还是“现在还不能做”，读懂它比记术语更重要。

真要动手时

你可以把这一节当成权限说明书，真正配置时优先盯住 default、required、allow、deny 这几个词。

先别急着背术语

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Context engine 新本领插件s own session context orchestration for ingest, assembly, and compaction. Register them from your 新…。

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Context engine 新本领插件s own session context orchestration for ingest, assembly, and compaction. Register them from your 新…。

原文小纸条

Context engine plugins own session context orchestration for ingest, assembly, and compaction. Register them from your plugin with api.registerContextEngine(id, factory), then select the active engine with plugins.slots.contextEngine.

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Use this when your 新本领插件 needs to replace or extend the default context pipeline rather than just add memory search or…。

原文小纸条

Use this when your plugin needs to replace or extend the default context pipeline rather than just add memory search or hooks.

像魔法口令拆解

这段像放在桌上的操作卡，谁来照着做，现场就会动起来。

  • 这一行“import { buildMemorySystemPromptAddition } from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/core";”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
  • 这一行“export default function (api) {”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
  • 这一行“api.registerContextEngine("lossless-claw", (ctx) => ({”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
原文代码块
import { buildMemorySystemPromptAddition } from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/core";

export default function (api) {
  api.registerContextEngine("lossless-claw", (ctx) => ({
    info: { id: "lossless-claw", name: "Lossless Claw", ownsCompaction: true },
    async ingest() {
      return { ingested: true };
    },
    async assemble({ messages, availableTools, citationsMode }) {
      return {
        messages,
        estimatedTokens: 0,
        systemPromptAddition: buildMemorySystemPromptAddition({
          availableTools: availableTools ?? new Set(),
          citationsMode,
        }),
      };
    },
    async compact() {
      return { ok: true, compacted: false };
    },
  }));
}
像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：The factory ctx exposes optional 设置说明书, 机器人朋友Dir, and workspaceDir values for construction-time initialization.

原文小纸条

The factory ctx exposes optional config, agentDir, and workspaceDir values for construction-time initialization.

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：If your engine does **not** own the compaction algorithm, keep compact() implemented and delegate it explicitly:。

原文小纸条

If your engine does **not** own the compaction algorithm, keep compact() implemented and delegate it explicitly:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像放在桌上的操作卡，谁来照着做，现场就会动起来。

  • 这一行“import {”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
  • 这一行“buildMemorySystemPromptAddition,”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
  • 这一行“delegateCompactionToRuntime,”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
原文代码块
import {
  buildMemorySystemPromptAddition,
  delegateCompactionToRuntime,
} from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/core";

export default function (api) {
  api.registerContextEngine("my-memory-engine", (ctx) => ({
    info: {
      id: "my-memory-engine",
      name: "My Memory Engine",
      ownsCompaction: false,
    },
    async ingest() {
      return { ingested: true };
    },
    async assemble({ messages, availableTools, citationsMode }) {
      return {
        messages,
        estimatedTokens: 0,
        systemPromptAddition: buildMemorySystemPromptAddition({
          availableTools: availableTools ?? new Set(),
          citationsMode,
        }),
      };
    },
    async compact(params) {
      return await delegateCompactionToRuntime(params);
    },
  }));
}

第 23 站

Adding a new capability

这一节在讲规则和边界：什么默认允许、什么必须显式打开、什么被禁止。

这段在解决什么

这一节在讲规则和边界：什么默认允许、什么必须显式打开、什么被禁止。

为什么值得看

这种内容决定了 OpenClaw 是“能做”还是“现在还不能做”，读懂它比记术语更重要。

真要动手时

你可以把这一节当成权限说明书，真正配置时优先盯住 default、required、allow、deny 这几个词。

先别急着背术语

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：When a 新本领插件 needs behavior that does not fit the current 对话接口, do not bypass the 新本领插件 system with a private reach-in.…。

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：When a 新本领插件 needs behavior that does not fit the current 对话接口, do not bypass the 新本领插件 system with a private reach-in.…。

原文小纸条

When a plugin needs behavior that does not fit the current API, do not bypass the plugin system with a private reach-in. Add the missing capability.

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Recommended sequence:。

原文小纸条

Recommended sequence:

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：1. define the core contract Decide what shared behavior core should own: policy, fallback, 设置说明书 merge, lifecycle, 消息通道…。

原文小纸条

1. define the core contract Decide what shared behavior core should own: policy, fallback, config merge, lifecycle, channel-facing semantics, and runtime helper shape. 2. add typed plugin registration/runtime surfaces Extend OpenClawPluginApi and/or api.runtime with the smallest useful typed capability surface. 3. wire core + channel/feature consumers Channels and feature plugins should consume the new capability through core, not by importing a vendor implementation directly. 4. register vendor implementations Vendor plugins then register their backends against the capability. 5. add contract coverage Add tests so ownership and registration shape stay explicit over time.

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：This is how OpenClaw stays opinionated without becoming hardcoded to one provider's worldview. See the Capability Cookb…。

原文小纸条

This is how OpenClaw stays opinionated without becoming hardcoded to one provider's worldview. See the Capability Cookbook for a concrete file checklist and worked example.

第 24 站

Capability checklist

这一节在讲一类能力是怎么工作的：它能做什么、不能做什么、适合在什么场景下调用。

这段在解决什么

这一节在讲一类能力是怎么工作的：它能做什么、不能做什么、适合在什么场景下调用。

为什么值得看

你理解的是能力边界，不只是功能名字。

真要动手时

如果这节里同时出现命令、配置和例子，优先先看例子，再回头看配置。

先别急着背术语

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：When you add a new capability, the implementation should usually touch these surfaces together: 新本领插件s need to consume…。

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：When you add a new capability, the implementation should usually touch these surfaces together:。

原文小纸条

When you add a new capability, the implementation should usually touch these surfaces together:

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：新本领插件s need to consume it。

原文小纸条

plugins need to consume it

像准备清单

这一串条目别硬背，把它当成“Capability checklist”门口贴出来的几张便签就行。它们在提醒你先备好什么、别漏掉什么、哪里最容易走错：core contract types in src/<capability>/t…、core runner/runtime helper in src/<capabi…、新本领插件 对话接口 registration surface in src/新本…、新本领插件 registry wiring in src/新本领插件s/regis…。

原文小纸条
  • core contract types in src/<capability>/types.ts
  • core runner/runtime helper in src/<capability>/runtime.ts
  • plugin API registration surface in src/plugins/types.ts
  • plugin registry wiring in src/plugins/registry.ts
  • plugin runtime exposure in src/plugins/runtime/* when feature/channel
  • capture/test helpers in src/test-utils/plugin-registration.ts
  • ownership/contract assertions in src/plugins/contracts/registry.ts
  • operator/plugin docs in docs/
像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：If one of those surfaces is missing, that is usually a sign the capability is not fully integrated yet.

原文小纸条

If one of those surfaces is missing, that is usually a sign the capability is not fully integrated yet.

第 25 站

Capability template

这一节在讲一类能力是怎么工作的：它能做什么、不能做什么、适合在什么场景下调用。

这段在解决什么

这一节在讲一类能力是怎么工作的：它能做什么、不能做什么、适合在什么场景下调用。

为什么值得看

你理解的是能力边界，不只是功能名字。

真要动手时

如果这节里同时出现命令、配置和例子，优先先看例子，再回头看配置。

先别急着背术语

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Minimal pattern: Contract test pattern: That keeps the rule simple:。

像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Minimal pattern:。

原文小纸条

Minimal pattern:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像放在桌上的操作卡，谁来照着做，现场就会动起来。

  • 这一行“// core contract”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
  • 这一行“export type VideoGenerationProviderPlugin = {”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
  • 这里在给“id”挂牌子，告诉系统它该指向“string;”。
原文代码块
// core contract
export type VideoGenerationProviderPlugin = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  generateVideo: (req: VideoGenerationRequest) => Promise<VideoGenerationResult>;
};

// plugin API
api.registerVideoGenerationProvider({
  id: "openai",
  label: "OpenAI",
  async generateVideo(req) {
    return await generateOpenAiVideo(req);
  },
});

// shared runtime helper for feature/channel plugins
const clip = await api.runtime.videoGeneration.generate({
  prompt: "Show the robot walking through the lab.",
  cfg,
});
像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：Contract test pattern:。

原文小纸条

Contract test pattern:

像魔法口令拆解

这段像放在桌上的操作卡，谁来照着做，现场就会动起来。

  • 这一行“expect(findVideoGenerationProviderIdsForPlugin("openai")).toEqual(["openai"]);”是在给电脑递一张小纸条，告诉它眼下该做哪一步。
原文代码块
expect(findVideoGenerationProviderIdsForPlugin("openai")).toEqual(["openai"]);
像讲绘本

如果把这一段摆成一个小场景，你会看到几样东西正在互相打招呼、拦路或者传东西。别急着记名词，先抓住它此刻到底在发生什么：That keeps the rule simple:。

原文小纸条

That keeps the rule simple:

像准备清单

这一串条目别硬背，把它当成“Capability template”门口贴出来的几张便签就行。它们在提醒你先备好什么、别漏掉什么、哪里最容易走错：core owns the capability contract + orche…、vendor 新本领插件s own vendor implementations、feature/消息通道 新本领插件s consume runtime helpe…、contract tests keep ownership explicit。

原文小纸条
  • core owns the capability contract + orchestration
  • vendor plugins own vendor implementations
  • feature/channel plugins consume runtime helpers
  • contract tests keep ownership explicit

第 26 站

Related

这一节更像安装或配置步骤，重点不是概念，而是“按什么顺序做才不会卡住”。

这段在解决什么

这一节更像安装或配置步骤，重点不是概念，而是“按什么顺序做才不会卡住”。

为什么值得看

很多文档看起来长，其实是在防你漏掉前置条件。

真要动手时

真正照做时，先找前置条件，再找必填项，最后看验证方法。

先别急着背术语

这一小段像旁白，在提醒我们镜头已经切到下一站。

像准备清单

这一串条目别硬背，把它当成“Related”门口贴出来的几张便签就行。它们在提醒你先备好什么、别漏掉什么、哪里最容易走错：新本领插件 architecture — public capability 聪明…、新本领插件 SDK subpaths、新本领插件 SDK setup、Building 新本领插件s。

原文小纸条
  • Plugin architecture — public capability model and shapes
  • Plugin SDK subpaths
  • Plugin SDK setup
